subject: Fuecoco, a small rounded red crocodilian Pokémon with a wide open mouth, in an energetic pose
description: Fuecoco stands in an energetic forward-leaning pose with its wide mouth open, stubby arms raised slightly to the sides. The creature has a round, compact body in red with a pale cream-colored face and belly area, small beady eyes, and a blocky rectangular head with a large mouth. The background shows a warm orange and yellow gradient with hints of a simple landscape. The overall impression is of a cheerful, enthusiastic creature ready for action. The art style is clean anime illustration.
foreground: Fuecoco in an energetic pose, mouth open wide
background: Warm orange-yellow gradient with simple landscape elements
